name: Athena Technology Acquisition Corp. II
summary: . Introduction We are a blank check company formed as a Delaware corporation for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses (the business combination). While we may pursue an acquisition in any business industry or sector, we intend to focus our efforts identifying businesses in the fintech, enterprise, deep tech and health-tech industries.
